sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 애플은 2025 회계연도 4분기 매출 1,025억 달러를 기록하며 분기 및 연간 매출 기록을 경신했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 애플은 4분기 매출 1,025억 달러를 기록하며 9월 분기 기준 역대 최고치를 달성했습니다.
아이폰 매출과 서비스 부문 매출이 각각 분기 및 역대 최고 기록을 경신하며 성장을 견인했습니다.
2025 회계연도 전체 매출은 4,160억 달러를 기록하며 기록적인 한 해를 마무리했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 모든 제품 카테고리와 지역 부문에서 활성 기기 설치 기반이 역대 최고치를 기록했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 8% 증가한 1,025억 달러를 기록했습니다.
조정 기준 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 1.85달러로 전년 동기 대비 13% 증가했습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a8-kex991q4202509272025.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Apple reports fourth quarter results September quarter records for total company revenue, iPhone revenue and EPS Services revenue reaches new all-time high CUPERTINO, CALIFORNIA — Apple ® today announced financial results for its fiscal 2025 fourth quarter ended September 27, 2025. The Company posted quarterly revenue of $102.5 billion, up 8 percent year over year. Diluted earnings per share was $1.85, up 13 percent year over year on an adjusted basis. 1 “Today, Apple is very proud to report a September quarter revenue record of $102.5 billion, including a September quarter revenue record for iPhone and an all-time revenue record for Services,” said Tim Cook, Apple’s CEO. “In September, we were thrilled to launch our best iPhone lineup ever, including iPhone 17, iPhone 17 Pro and Pro Max, and iPh  Normalized numeric aliases: $102.5 billion = 1,025억 달러; $102.5 = 102.5달러; $1.85 = 1.85달러; 8 percent = 8%; 13 percent = 13%.

launched the fantastic AirPods Pro 3 and the all-new Apple Watch lineup. When combined with the recently announced MacBook Pro and iPad Pro with the powerhouse M5 chip, we are excited to be sharing our most extraordinary lineup of products as we head into the holiday season.” “Our September quarter results capped off a record fiscal year, with revenue reaching $416 billion, as well as double-digit EPS growth,” said Kevan Parekh, Apple’s CFO. “And thanks to our very high levels of customer satisfaction and loyalty, our installed base of active devices also reached a new all-time high across all product categories and geographic segments.” Apple’s board of directors has declared a cash dividend of $0.26 per share of the Company’s common stock. The dividend is payable on November 13, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on November 10, 2025.
